categories.title: SLOGANS & SYMBOLS
categories.theme: Brand slogans, marketing phrases, and cultural symbols — answer is the BRAND, COMPANY, or CULTURAL TERM

clues.clue: "Have it your way" is the famous marketing slogan of this fast-food chain known for the Whopper.
"The Best a Man Can Get" is the long-running tagline of this razor and grooming brand.
This Swedish automaker, whose name means 'I roll' in Latin, was founded in 1927 and is associated with safety.
This pagan Celtic festival of the dead, celebrated at the end of October, is the ancient origin of Halloween.
Mexico's national tree, towering over the country's ancient sites, bears this name honoring an Aztec emperor.

finals.title: PRESIDENTIAL RECORDS
finals.clue: He is the only U.S. president to have been elected to the nation's highest office four times, serving from 1933 until his death in office in 1945.
